message:
refactor(fwc): remove dead code from truth resolver and invoke dispatch, fix structured log serialization

truth.rs cleanup:
- Remove unused `best_partial` variable from `resolve()` — the partial
  fallback block that consumed it was already dead code (unreachable after
  the source-iteration loop returns on first success); the variable
  declaration was left behind, triggering an unused-variable warning
- Remove the entire partial-result degraded-fallback block that was
  unreachable because the resolve loop already handles partial results in
  the per-source attempt loop at line ~841
- Fix OperatorEvidenceLookup::to_structured_log and
  RemediationOutput::to_structured_log to use serde_json::to_value()
  instead of format!("{:?}", ...).to_lowercase() for the command field,
  producing proper JSON enum serialization instead of Rust Debug format
- Fix owned-to-borrowed clone: change `detail.clone()` to just `detail`
  where the value is already owned and moved into the SourceAttempt
- Update RemediationOutput doc comment: "five major operator commands"
  is now "six operator commands" to include the `status` command

main.rs:
- Remove unused `_live_envelope` binding in invoke_dispatch_host — the
  CommandEnvelope was constructed but never read, wasting an allocation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
